title: Talking about my life - Boulder, Colorado 20/21

Like blue glasses there's this like fat girl who dressed like gothically like a witch and then
There's this other girl who's like all like talked about being stoned and stuff and it's funny like

I only took latin because all of the other classes were full I wanted to take french that was full I

Guys did mount sunitas you fucking dick and he like put his arms around some other girl to talk to or

Like he never gave one he never gave me one dude so um but uh that was that that's all I remember

We were like we're not dude we're just we're just like um this is part of our class don't worry about
It we're not fucking skipping class don't you remember me he was he was a dick man but that's

Where you do where you have to like take a picture of something and then you go and

Which is really weird oh wait ding I just remembered another class it was some kind of

He was on the junior national cycling team and he was just there just visiting I think he was living
With ingrid and david alangi and he became my friend and we I took him climbing at the climbing

At the climbing gym so I took he and ingrid once but I never went riding with him for some reason
I should have gone riding with him man but whatever I didn't ride with anybody that was my thing I guess
But there's this other dude I remember terrence lapatosky again he was in that class and he storms
In the class one day and he's like I'm not coming to class today because I'm going to the rodney king
Demonstration because that was when rodney king like when the cops got off for beating up rodney king
So like so so everybody in the class is like oh that sounds like a good idea let's go so we all
Just left the class and the teacher was like all right no class today so we went out front there was
Like hundreds of kids out in front of the school and like and I actually got up front of the school and
I go yeah we should sign a petition and I held a I held out a a notebook and I'm like sign this
Petition this is where we sign it and we're going to send it to somebody so they like passed it around
And I think they gave it back to me and then I gave it to like whoever the fucking organizer was
Or I gave it to like the main person but anyways then we joined some like uh march or the it was
The fucking boulder high march literally the entire freaking high school like 1800 kids took over
Took over the entire city we marched all over boulder we went up onto the uh
University and the cops showed up and escorted us they didn't even try to kick us out because
It was no use the cops fucking blocked out all the streets and basically turned it into a parade for
Boulder high protesting rodney king we had like the cars and we were making like posters and like
Chanting and it was crazy it like made the newspaper and stuff it was wild we took over uh canyon
Canyon and broadway and we were just hanging out in the middle of canyon and broadway for like a half
Hour just like hanging out and chanting and stuff and nobody could do shit it was so fucking crazy
But uh yeah but uh that's the only class I remember I don't even remember what class that was
For spring break I went on a trip into utah with some half apache kid named
Brian and then ben marshall but those guys just talked to each other the whole time and it
Fucking pissed me off and that I wasn't having fun at all hiking through through forest or canyons and
Stuff and then my car broke down and I was driving it and uh my dad actually insisted on being the one
To go out there and pick it up but then the school year was over and that's all I remember of high
School and but as far as home life in high school I don't even remember much I just remember hanging
Out with my parents a lot my parents would have lots of parties and stuff like back in the early 80s
My parents we were the people who had all the biggest of the parties for the buddhist community
Because we had the biggest house like we had this ridiculously big house it had like 20 bedrooms in
It it was insane and um so we'd have all these big parties there and then of course our land we had
38 acres in the mountains we had one huge party there with like thousands of people but even even in
Our new house and and 15 1445 balsam balsam and 15th street on the corner there we uh in the white house
We uh we had some a lot of parties my parents did new year's parties and stuff buddhist people
Come over and um that was a cool house too man we had a huge backyard it was like a house taking up
Two lots we had this big ass raspberry field in the backyard and it always had raspberries like in
The field it had a ridiculous amount of raspberries picking up the raspberries and just filling up huge
Baskets of raspberries we had a peach tree but it only gave peaches the first year and then it died
And then we had like cranapple trees and and then the kids on the other side of the street were some
Buddhist kids who we'd known for a long time the arthur's richard arthur and like um don arthur and
Then they had like adam julian and michael arthur and so adam was like a year younger than me so we
Were like hung out he was like a black belt in taekwondo he was like half japanese because like don was
Japanese and uh we hung out but then they moved up to um canada and um and uh yeah but I guess adam
Had a problem he like they were at a they were at gay star's birthday party and I guess everybody was
Tripping on acid he was on acid his dad came to pick him up and he like freaked out and jumped out
Of the bathroom of the second story and landed on his head and was in a coma for like three weeks
And then when he came out of the coma he was acting kind of weird he like put makeup on his face and
Stuff and just try to act weird just to freak you out and like he was he was my weightlifting partner
In high school and he was really athletic so we had fun he was strong dude we would like doing like
Weightlifting together so that was that was cool but he was still a total stoner by then he'd like
Pointed his pants and be like dude you know what that is I was like what he's like pot resin
He was like cool and I think he even invited me to go smoke weed but I said no
For some reason because that was in 11th grade and I I raced bikes between 11th and 12th grade and
When I was racing bikes I wasn't smoking anything I was like totally healthy I ate really healthy food
And there was this other kid who I was lifting weights with in that class so there's another

And this other kid was like really athletic and I can't remember his name though but yeah
